title: APM: SQL Injection Attack Detection
description: Detects SQL injection payloads in HTTP URLs captured by OCI APM. Covers UNION-based, boolean-based, time-based blind, and error-based injection techniques in request parameters.
query: 'Log Source' in ('enterprise-crm-portal', 'octo-drone-shop', 'SOC Application Logs') and ('HTTP URL' like '%UNION SELECT%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%UNION%20SELECT%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%union select%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%27%20OR%201%3D1%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%OR+1=1%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%DROP TABLE%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%DROP%20TABLE%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%WAITFOR DELAY%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%SLEEP(%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%BENCHMARK(%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%INFORMATION_SCHEMA%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%information_schema%') | stats count as Attacks by 'HTTP URL', 'HTTP Method', 'Client IP', 'service.name' | sort -Attacks
falsepositives: Legitimate search queries containing SQL keywords
